contents.content: I'm 🧔‍♂️ still deciding / I'm still debating with myself / I'm still considering a few options
Oh no, the window got broken
to be debating, to consider a few options
When did the Metropolitan open for the first time?
He is less powerful/strong than her
I have nothing except you/ but you 👩‍🦰
I was at the beach and I got sunburned
Did you 👩‍🦰 call me?  (not by phone)
How many books did you 👩‍🦰 read?
Are you 🧔 missing anything/something, do you miss anything/something
Call me when you 👩‍🦰 are ready
Just in case, to be on the safe side
אני לא מוצא את הטלפון שלי
I don't miss anything, I'm not missing anything
to call (someone, not on the phone)
The bank closes everyday at five
Oh no, the cake is burning
Really?? What's up with her? What's her deal?
What's up with him? What's his deal?
Oh no, the rice is burning
Weird, but in a good way
Really?! Wow! What a story! How interesting! How amazing!
The door is not opening, the door doesn't open
If you 🧔‍♂️ would have called me, I👩‍🦰would have helped you🧔‍♂️
אם היית מתקשר אליי, הייתי עוזרת לך
If I 🧔‍♂️ knew him, I 🧔‍♂️ would talk to him
אם הייתי מכיר אותו, הייתי מדבר איתו
If I 👩‍🦰 hadn’t been working, I 👩‍🦰 would have gone to the beach
אם לא הייתי עובדת, הייתי הולכת לים
As far as I’m concerned, from my point of view, from my perspective
Call 🧔‍♂️ me when the food is ready
Are you reading something right now?
Not really, as far as I'm concerned
I asked them to help me
What did she aske from him?
There is no problem, as far as we are concerned
It's fine by me (literally: "as far as I'm concerned, it's fine")
If you🧔‍♂️ had a plane ticket, where would you fly?
אם היה לך כרטיס טיסה, לאן היית טס?
If I had enough time, I would have helped him
אם היה לי מספיק זמן, הייתי עוזר לו
He rides a bicycle, unless it rains
הוא נוסע באופניים, אלא אם יורד גשם
The contract ends at the beginning of April
They are getting married at the beginning of summer
I (🧔‍♂️) study in order to get better at Hebrew (to 'get improved')
Tomorrow at 5! Are we set (on the time)??
Have you👩‍🦰 scheduled an appointment with the dentist?
Try your🧔‍♂️ best to arrive on time
They will go (by vehicle) to Eilat on Saturday
Where will you 🧔‍♂️ go (by vehicle) on the weekend?
Will the store be open tomorrow?
Did he set up a meeting with Beyonce
The market closed an hour ago
to try your best, to try hard, to make an effort
Be careful, the glass is broken!
Where were you 🧔‍♂️ before the movie?
Where did you 👩‍🦰 go after the party?
He will be happy to come with you 👩‍🦰
I would be happy to! I would love to!
She will go (by vehicle) to Berlin
Did you 🧔‍♂️ send her the email?
He did it to spite her
Until what time are you at the office= by what time are you at the office?
I arrived although the bus was late
It was fun, despite the rain
I've  👩‍🦰  been thinking about you 🧔‍♂️ ever since we met
I'll be home by 5 = I'll be home until 5
Give 👩‍🦰it back to me. It's mine
תחזירי לי את זה. זה שלי.
to move something, to make something move
What are you🧔‍♂️ bringing to the party?
Do you🧔‍♂️ want us to switch to English?
I transferred the money to you🧔‍♂️
Why are you🧔‍♂️ yelling at me?!
Are you🧔‍♂️ afraid of the dark?
to yell, to scream, to shout
What does the sign on the door say?
I was late because the bus was late
I🧔‍♂️ don't like to be late
When did you👩‍🦰 wake up this morning?
Did you🧔‍♂️ prepare for the interview?
I have no energy for that/I'm not dealing with this
This jacket looks good on you 🧔‍♂️
These glasses look good on you 👩‍🦰
This shirt looks good on you 👩‍🦰
Everyone was standing outside the office
He was standing outside the restaurant
I waited for you 👩‍🦰outside the restaurant
The food at the party was a bummer
He thinks outside of the box
Working on the weekend is really upsetting/ annoying
Don’t 👩‍🦰upset me/ Don’t bum me out
The one studying at the university
You👩‍🦰 better get ready for the test
Should one go to the beach in December?
What's the worst movie you've🧔‍♂️ seen?
He's a perfectionist, in a good way
Where is the one🧔‍♂️ who plays the guitar?
Where is the one🧔‍♂️ who speaks on the phone?
Should I go to the beach today?
Where is the one 👩‍🦰with the black hat?
